releaseNotes:
fix(config): point distributed release build at DEV; bump 0.1.2

Login failed because the signed release build targeted prod
(gatekeeper.neolinkrnd.com), which the test phone can't reach and where the
warehouse backend isn't deployed. There's no prod env yet, so the release build
now inherits the DEV hosts (dev-gatekeeper / dev-hive-logistic) like debug.
Prod URLs preserved in a comment; introduce dev/prod flavors when prod lands.
